home.heroSubtitle: Misr-Gate links your vehicle and wallet so tolls and gate fees clear instantly—no cash, no queues, full transparency.
home.sectionHowSubtitle: Register once, add your vehicles, and drive through supported gates with automatic billing.
home.step1Text: Sign up with your email, verify with OTP, and upload license details securely.
home.step2Text: Add English and Arabic plate data, top up your wallet, and manage multiple vehicles.
home.step3Text: Fees post automatically. Review trips, receipts, and history anytime in your dashboard.
home.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Misr-Gate
home.faq1q: How do I register for Misr-Gate?
home.faq1a: Click Create Account, complete your profile, verify your email with OTP, and add your vehicle and payment method. Most users finish in under five minutes.
home.faq2a: We use strong encryption and do not store raw card data. Payments are processed through compliant partners.
home.faq3q: What happens if I'm charged incorrectly?
home.faq3a: Disputes can be opened from your dashboard. Our team reviews cases and issues refunds when appropriate.
home.faq4a: Coverage is growing across governorates. Check your dashboard for the latest list of participating locations.
home.faq5q: Can I use Misr-Gate with multiple vehicles?
home.faq5a: Yes. Register several vehicles under one account and manage them from a single wallet and trip history.
home.faq6a: No platform subscription. You pay standard gate fees only—we don't add hidden monthly charges.
home.ctaDesc: Join drivers who use Misr-Gate for faster, cashless passage.
home.footerTagline: Automating vehicle entry payments across Egypt. Drive seamlessly, pay automatically.
home.copyright: © 2026 Misr-Gate. All rights reserved. Ministry of Transport initiative.

login.brandingDesc: Secure sign-in to Egypt's digital gate payment platform—wallet, trips, and fleet tools in one place.
login.formSubtitle: Please enter your credentials to access your account.

signup.joinDesc: Create your account in three steps—personal details, vehicle info, and a secure password—then start using digital gate payments across Egypt.
signup.pwdHint: Minimum 8 characters, include uppercase, lowercase, and numbers
signup.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
signup.securityNotice: Your information is encrypted and stored securely. We never share your personal data with third parties.
signup.phOtp: Enter the code sent to your email
signup.plateAcceptedBody: Your Egyptian plate {{plate}} is verified and officially linked to your Misr-Gate wallet. You are cleared to roll.
signup.aiScanPending: AI scan is processing or models are unavailable on the server.
signup.signupError: We could not complete registration. Please check your details and try again.
signup.aiPlateHint: Upload a clear photo of your vehicle. Our AI reads the license plate automatically — no manual entry.
signup.licenseRequired: Upload a vehicle photo so we can detect your plate.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back, {{name}}. Here's your fleet overview.
dashboard.loadError: Could not load dashboard. Please sign in again.
dashboard.alertUnpaidGatePassDesc: You need at least {{amount}} on your wallet to clear this gate pass.
dashboard.alertViolationMinDesc: Keep at least {{amount}} in your wallet to cover this violation minimum.
dashboard.aiPlateSubtitle: Latest scan from your registered vehicle photo
dashboard.aiNoScan: No AI scan yet. Upload a photo from Plate AI Scan.

plateScan.title: Plate AI Scan
plateScan.subtitle: Upload a vehicle photo — AI reads the plate and simulates a gate toll charge
plateScan.uploadHint: Simulate driving through a gate: upload a vehicle photo and a toll fare is charged to your wallet.
plateScan.vehicleAdded: New vehicle added to your account
plateScan.noScans: No scans yet. Upload an image above or complete signup with a license photo.
plateScan.scanError: Scan failed. Check that AI models are installed on the server.
plateScan.adminSubtitle: Scan a plate and auto-assign the vehicle to the detected user.
plateScan.adminUploadHint: Upload a vehicle photo and the system will link the plate to the matching user account automatically.
plateScan.selectUserFirst: Select a user account before uploading.
plateScan.ownerHint: Gate fares and trips are recorded on this user's wallet.

wallet.title: Wallet & Payment History
wallet.subtitle: Manage your wallet and payment transactions.
wallet.loadError: Could not load wallet. Please sign in again.

trips.title: Trip History
trips.subtitle: View and manage your trip records and payments.
trips.chartNoData: No trips to show on the chart yet. Adjust filters or complete a trip.
trips.loadError: Could not load trips. Please sign in again.

editProfile.title: Edit Profile
editProfile.subtitle: Update your personal information, photo, and vehicles.
editProfile.vehiclesAdminOnly: New vehicles are registered by an administrator at the gate (Plate AI Scan).
editProfile.verificationIntro: For security reasons, please confirm your password before applying changes.
editProfile.needCurrentToSave: Enter your current password in the verification field below to save changes.
editProfile.verifyBeforeSave: Confirm your current password with Verify before saving.
editProfile.saveFailed: Could not save profile. Check your current password and try again.
editProfile.confirmDeleteVehicle: Remove this vehicle from your account?

addVehicle.title: Add Vehicle
addVehicle.subtitle: Enter your vehicle details to link it to your Autofare account.
addVehicle.subtitleAi: Upload a vehicle photo — AI reads the plate and links the car to your account.
addVehicle.aiHint: No manual plate entry. The plate is detected from your photo.
addVehicle.error: Could not add vehicle. Try another photo.
addVehicle.infoBody: Make sure all vehicle details are accurate. Your vehicle will be verified before it can be used for toll payments on Autofare.

recharge.title: Recharge Wallet
recharge.subtitle: Enter your card details to add funds to your wallet.
recharge.security: Your payment information is securely encrypted.
recharge.errAmount: Please select or enter a valid amount.
recharge.savedNotSupported: Please use “New card” to complete a recharge.
recharge.apiError: Payment could not be processed. Check your card details.
